categories.label: Slash Commands
categories.description: Public Discord slash commands members can run.

commands.name: suggest
commands.description: Submit a community suggestion in the current channel.

options.name: suggestion
options.description: What would you like to suggest?

commands.name: giveaway
commands.description: Create and manage premium giveaways.

subcommands.name: start
subcommands.description: Start a giveaway with prize, duration, winners, roles, and optional image.

subcommands.name: proof
subcommands.description: Post image proof for an active or previous giveaway.

commands.name: bot-updates
commands.description: View the latest ECRP Assistant features and improvements.
commands.notes: Public slash command was removed from normal use, but the data exists in the bot module.

commands.name: bot-updates-staff
commands.description: View staff setup notes and commands for bot features.

categories.label: Prefix Commands
categories.description: Dash commands used by staff/devs in Discord chat.

commands.name: ticket setup
commands.description: Post the advanced ECRP ticket panel.

commands.name: ticketrateset
commands.description: Set the channel where ticket rating/review results are sent.

commands.name: ticketlogset
commands.description: Set the channel where transcript logs are sent.

commands.name: setsupport
commands.description: Set the support role that gets pinged in new tickets.

commands.name: counting setup
commands.description: Configure the advanced counting channel and optional starting number.

commands.name: counting status
commands.description: Show counting channel, next number, and rule status.

commands.name: counting reset
commands.description: Reset counting to a chosen start number.

commands.name: counting disable
commands.description: Turn off the counting system.

commands.name: botupdates
commands.description: Send the public ECRP Bot Updates embed.

commands.name: botlogs
commands.description: Open the developer logs panel and hosted log viewer.

commands.name: sv
commands.description: Start a session vote.

commands.name: ss
commands.description: Start the session, ping host, and mention users who voted.

commands.name: se
commands.description: End the current session.

commands.name: session status
commands.description: Show the current session/vote status.

commands.name: session roster
commands.description: Manage or view the session roster.

commands.name: session history
commands.description: View recent session history.

commands.name: session cancel
commands.description: Cancel an active session vote.

commands.name: session attendance add/remove
commands.description: Adjust attendance for a session member.

categories.label: Automatic Systems
categories.description: Background systems and panels that run without a normal command flow.

commands.name: Advanced Ticket System
commands.description: Support, Partnership, Player Report, Staff Report, Ban Appeal, and Other ticket categories with claim/completed/close controls.

commands.name: Ticket Transcripts & Reviews
commands.description: Saves transcript pages, sends created/closed timestamps, and posts review buttons after close.

commands.name: Advanced Suggestions
commands.description: Persistent suggestion embeds with upvote/downvote/remove-vote controls.

commands.name: Live Bot Status
commands.description: Status panel can sync online/offline state for bot monitoring.

commands.name: Birthday Posts
commands.description: Posts birthday messages at 12AM and pings the birthday user.

commands.name: Developer Web Logs
commands.description: Publishes console/error logs to the protected PrestonHQ website viewer with refresh and clear controls.
